case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS IBARRA, ENRIQUE JR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA, ENRIQUE JR.
